title: Familia y relaciones
communication_goal: Usar familia y relaciones en situaciones cotidianas.
cefr_objectives: Can use basic language related to familia y relaciones.
explanation_es: Este tema desarrolla familia y relaciones mediante práctica guiada y comunicación contextual.

lessons.title: My family
lessons.objective: Nombrar familiares y describir relaciones básicas usando my, your, his y her.

activities.prompt: My mother's son is my ___.
activities.feedback_correct: El hijo de tu madre puede ser tu hermano.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Piensa en un hombre de tu misma familia inmediata.

activities.prompt: My father's daughter is my ___.
activities.feedback_correct: La hija de tu padre es tu hermana.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la palabra para una mujer de tu familia inmediata.

activities.prompt: This is Ana. ___ mother is a doctor.
activities.feedback_correct: Ana es mujer; usamos her para hablar de su madre.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige el posesivo correspondiente a Ana.

activities.instruction: Une cada familiar con su significado.
activities.feedback_correct: Reconoces familiares básicos en inglés.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Relaciona cada palabra con la persona correcta de la familia.

activities.prompt: is / my / This / sister
activities.feedback_correct: This is presenta a una persona y my indica relación.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Empieza con This is y coloca my antes de sister.

activities.prompt: This is my family. My mother is Maria, my father is Luis, and my brother is Diego.
activities.question: What is the brother's name?
activities.feedback_correct: Diego es el hermano mencionado al final.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la frase después de my brother is.

activities.prompt: mother, father, sister, brother. This is my mother. This is my brother.
evaluation_criteria: clear th in mother and father
activities.feedback_correct: Los nombres familiares se entienden con claridad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica el sonido th sin convertirlo en t o d y termina claramente brother.

activities.prompt: Sofia has one brother and two sisters. Her brother is fifteen. Her sisters are ten and twelve.
activities.question: How many sisters does Sofia have?
activities.feedback_correct: El texto dice two sisters.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca el número junto a sisters.

activities.prompt: Write five sentences about your family. Use family words and at least three possessive adjectives.
activities.feedback_correct: Describes familiares y relaciones con claridad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa si usas my, your, his, her o their según la persona.

activities.instruction: Habla de tu familia con la IA.
activities.prompt: Show the AI a fictional family photo. Name four people, explain their relationships, and answer follow-up questions.
success_criteria: uses at least four family words
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes explicar relaciones familiares básicas en conversación.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA te ofrece un árbol familiar y corrige una relación cada vez.

lessons.title: Family members and ages
lessons.objective: Describir quién es cada familiar y dar información básica sobre edades y convivencia.

activities.prompt: My mother's sister is my ___.
activities.feedback_correct: La hermana de tu madre es tu tía.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la palabra para la hermana de uno de tus padres.

activities.prompt: My sister's son is my ___.
activities.feedback_correct: El hijo de tu hermana es tu sobrino.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Es un niño relacionado con tu hermana; busca la palabra nephew.

activities.prompt: Tom is my brother. ___ is twenty years old.
activities.feedback_correct: Usamos he para Tom.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Tom es un hombre; elige el pronombre masculino.

activities.prompt: My grandparents ___ in a small town.
activities.feedback_correct: Grandparents es plural y usa live.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Con un sujeto plural usamos la forma base live.

activities.instruction: Une la relación con su definición.

pairs.right: sister of your mother or father
brother of your mother or father
child of your aunt or uncle
son of your brother or sister

activities.feedback_correct: Comprendes relaciones familiares ampliadas.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Piensa en quién es el padre o hermano de la persona descrita.

activities.prompt: My aunt lives with her husband and their two children. Their daughter is eight, and their son is six.
activities.question: How many children do they have?
activities.feedback_correct: La descripción dice their two children.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha el número antes de children.

activities.prompt: My aunt is forty. My uncle is forty-two. Their daughter is eight, and their son is six.
activities.feedback_correct: Las relaciones y edades se entienden bien.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica aunt sin añadir una vocal final y pronuncia claramente their.

activities.instruction: Lee el árbol familiar y responde.
activities.prompt: Emma has a large family. Her aunt lives next door. Her aunt has two children: a boy named Leo and a girl named Mia. Leo is Emma's cousin.
activities.question: Who is Leo?
activities.feedback_correct: El texto identifica la relación entre Leo y Emma.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la última oración del texto.

activities.prompt: Write six sentences about two family members. Include their relationship to you, age, city, and one activity they like.
activities.feedback_correct: Describes familiares con información concreta.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa my/his/her/their y revisa que cada frase tenga sujeto y verbo.

activities.prompt: The AI asks about your family tree. Explain who three relatives are, where they live, and how old they are.
success_criteria: uses aunt, uncle, cousin, nephew, or grandparents
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes explicar relaciones familiares más allá de la familia inmediata.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA muestra un árbol sencillo y te ayuda a elegir la relación correcta.

lessons.title: What my family likes
lessons.objective: Hablar de gustos, actividades y características básicas de familiares usando presente simple y adjetivos sencillos.

activities.prompt: My brother loves meeting people. He is ___.
activities.feedback_correct: Friendly describe a una persona amable y sociable.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca el adjetivo relacionado con tratar bien a otras personas.

activities.prompt: My sister ___ cooking on Sundays.
activities.feedback_correct: Con she usamos likes en presente simple.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Sister es tercera persona singular; añade s al verbo.

activities.prompt: My parents ___ soccer.
activities.feedback_correct: Parents es plural y usa la forma base enjoy.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Con un sujeto plural no añadas s al verbo.

activities.instruction: Une el adjetivo con su significado.
activities.feedback_correct: Reconoces adjetivos básicos para describir personas.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Relaciona cada palabra con la característica que describe.

activities.prompt: My cousin like reading and she play tennis.
activities.correct_answer: My cousin likes reading and she plays tennis.
activities.feedback_correct: Con cousin y she usamos likes y plays.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa la tercera persona singular en presente simple.

activities.prompt: My father is very funny. He likes telling stories, and he plays the guitar at family parties.
activities.question: What does the father like doing?
activities.feedback_correct: El audio dice he likes telling stories.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la actividad después de likes.

activities.prompt: My mother is kind. She likes gardening. My brother is funny. He plays the guitar.
evaluation_criteria: clear final s in likes and plays
activities.feedback_correct: Las descripciones y acciones se entienden con claridad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Marca suavemente la s final de likes y plays sin separar el verbo.

activities.prompt: My grandmother is very kind and funny. She likes gardening and watching old movies. She does not like loud music.
activities.question: What does she not like?
activities.feedback_correct: La negación aparece antes de like.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la oración con does not like.

activities.prompt: Write eight sentences about three relatives. Include one adjective and one activity or preference for each person.
evaluation_criteria: present simple with correct third-person s
activities.feedback_correct: Describes personas y gustos con oraciones comprensibles.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Comprueba la s de likes, plays, reads o watches con he/she.

activities.instruction: Presenta a tu familia a la IA.
activities.prompt: Tell the AI about three relatives. Describe their personalities and what they like or do. Ask the AI about its fictional family too.
success_criteria: uses likes and does not like
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes describir a tu familia más allá de los nombres y relaciones.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA te ayuda a corregir el verbo y a elegir un adjetivo más preciso.

lessons.title: A family conversation
lessons.objective: Mantener una conversación completa sobre familiares, relaciones, edades, lugares y gustos.

activities.prompt: My father's brother is my ___.
activities.feedback_correct: El hermano de tu padre es tu tío.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la palabra para el hermano de uno de tus padres.

activities.prompt: My cousins ___ in Canada.
activities.feedback_correct: Cousins es plural y usa live.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Con un sujeto plural usa la forma base del verbo.

activities.prompt: My aunt ___ cooking, but she ___ like shopping.
activities.feedback_correct: Con she usamos likes y doesn't like.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa la tercera persona singular en afirmación y negación.

activities.prompt: my / lives / cousin / in / Madrid
activities.feedback_correct: La oración usa sujeto, verbo, lugar y preposición correctamente.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Coloca My cousin al principio y lives antes de in Madrid.

activities.instruction: Une cada pregunta con la respuesta adecuada.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes obtener distintos datos sobre un familiar.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Identifica si la pregunta pide persona, lugar, gusto o edad.

activities.prompt: A: Tell me about your sister. B: Her name is Julia. She is twenty-four and lives in Lima. She works at a school and likes dancing.
activities.question: Where does Julia work?
activities.feedback_correct: Julia works at a school.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la información después de lives in Lima.

activities.prompt: This is my cousin. Her name is Ana. She lives in Bogotá and likes music. She is very friendly.
activities.feedback_correct: La descripción es clara y natural.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica her y la s final de lives y likes.

activities.prompt: The Rivera family is large. Carlos and Elena are married and have two children, Pablo and Sara. Pablo is twelve and likes soccer. Sara is nine and likes drawing. Their grandmother lives with them.
activities.question: Who lives with the family?
activities.feedback_correct: La última oración identifica a la persona que vive con ellos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la oración con lives with them.

activities.prompt: Write a short family profile with ten sentences. Include relationships, names, ages, places, occupations or studies, and likes.
activities.feedback_correct: Tu perfil comunica una imagen completa de una familia.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa los verbos con he/she y los posesivos antes de cada familiar.

activities.prompt: The AI is a new friend. Answer questions about your family, describe two relatives, compare their interests, and ask about the AI's fictional family.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes conversar sobre familia y relaciones con información suficiente.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA adapta sus preguntas y refuerza las estructuras que todavía confundes.
